text.tspan: Reuters poll: RBNZ interest rate forecasts
The Reserve Bank of New Zealand will likely lower its key
on Wednesday to support the economy
amid contained inflation and labour market weakness, a
The RBNZ targets inflation between 1% and 3%.
The Reuters survey was conducted August 11-14, 2025.
